improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers for business owners, traders, and professionals. Voice chat, unlimited workspace, and expert trade support. Start with 3 free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly stating what Gideon is, who it serves, and the free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional previews when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, and Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the price anchor (from US$2/day) sets expectations and attracts qualified leads. These tags are foundational SEO elements that cost nothing but significantly impact discoverability and social sharing.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three searches free — no card required."
improvements.rationale: This copy immediately identifies what Gideon is (AI assistant for trade/business), highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support), and reduces friction by emphasizing the free trial with no commitment. The name 'Gideon' personalizes the AI while 'Meet' creates an approachable invitation. Clear, scannable, and action-oriented.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to join as a member to continue. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own members workspace. Choose annual billing to save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the conversion funnel—what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition from free trial to paid membership and reinforcing the low daily cost and value included, it reduces uncertainty and objections, helping move prospects toward conversion.
